entities.description: As a subsection of '硬件资源', this section provides an overview of the crystal oscillator (晶振) hardware component included on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, detailing its role and specifications within the system.
Refers to the crystal oscillator, a critical hardware component used for generating stable clock signals in electronic systems, discussed in section 1.4.

relations.description: The concept of '晶振' is the primary topic of section 1.4.
